title: Brother Cassian at the East Pipe

lines: Cassian holds a listening cup against the pipe. The cords at his throat twitch after each pressure knock.
"The Clerk answers north. Something beyond the fields answers back."

choices.label: Ask him to cut the signal
Ask him to seal the Clerk in the wicket

questUpdate.log: Cassian cuts Junia’s answering signal from the water while preserving the wicket and original roll.

lines: "I can break this branch from the water line. We lose the cleanest record of the answer with it."
"Keep the pump steady while I choose where the silence begins."
Cassian knots a black cord around the wicket brace. Every rib mouth stops on the same unfinished number.
"The signal is cut from the water. It may still remember the road."

choices.label: Step away from the sealed wicket
